# My Hangul Name (내 한글 이름)

> My Hangul Name is a free tool by Wehome that converts any name from 19 languages into its closest natural Korean (Hangul) spelling — based on actual pronunciation and Korea's official 국립국어원 외래어 표기법. Every result includes audio, IPA, 20+ font previews, and generative Hangul Art. No sign-up, no ads.

Site: https://www.myhangulname.com

## How it works
- Type or say a name (e.g. "Caroline Smith") in any language.
- Get the recommended Hangul spelling plus alternatives, by language of origin.
- Listen to the pronunciation, copy the spelling, preview 20+ Korean fonts, or make Hangul Art.

## Key pages
- [Home — convert a name](https://www.myhangulname.com): main converter.
- [About / What is Hangul Name](https://www.myhangulname.com/hangul-name): features, how-to, supported languages, Hunminjeongeum background.
- [Korean Words to Know](https://www.myhangulname.com/korean-words): curated Korean words — Oxford English Dictionary entries, famous Koreans, K-pop groups & members, song titles, beautiful Hangul.
- [Learn Hangul](https://www.myhangulname.com/learn-hangul): the Korean alphabet in 59 seconds.
- [Hangul Art Gallery](https://www.myhangulname.com/gallery): generative art of popular names and words.

## K-pop & celebrity pages (member names, fan words, songs in Hangul)
- BTS 방탄소년단: https://www.myhangulname.com/bts
- BLACKPINK 블랙핑크: https://www.myhangulname.com/blackpink
- BIGBANG 빅뱅: https://www.myhangulname.com/bigbang
- IU 아이유: https://www.myhangulname.com/iu
- aespa 에스파: https://www.myhangulname.com/aespa
- NewJeans 뉴진스: https://www.myhangulname.com/newjeans
- (full list of 27 artists linked from /korean-words)

## API
- Free, CORS-enabled, no key. GET https://www.myhangulname.com/api/v1/transliterate?name=Caroline&lang=en
- Docs: https://www.myhangulname.com/api-docs — OpenAPI: https://www.myhangulname.com/api/v1/openapi.json

## About
Built and operated by Wehome (https://wehome.me), Korea's only government-authorized home-sharing platform. "Your Home in Korea."
